title: JavaScript Deobfuscation
html:
JavaScript Deobfuscation

Commands

cURL GET request

curl http:/SERVER_IP:PORT/

cURL POST request

curl -s http:/SERVER_IP:PORT/ -X POST

cURL POST request with data

curl -s http:/SERVER_IP:PORT/ -X POST -d "param1=sample"

base64 encode

echo hackthebox | base64

base64 decode

echo ENCODED_B64 | base64 -d

hex encode

echo hackthebox | xxd -p

hex decode

echo ENCODED_HEX | xxd -p -r

rot13 encode

echo hackthebox | tr 'A-Za-z' 'N-ZA-Mn-za-m'

rot13 decode

echo ENCODED_ROT13 | tr 'A-Za-z' 'N-ZA-Mn-za-m'

Deobfuscation Websites

Misc

Show HTML source code in Firefox

ctrl+u
